name: harness-hub
description: SuperSkill managed capability registry, universal installer, API, MCP and workspace control plane.

scripts.check: npm run check:mcp-registry && npm run check:plugin && npm run check:codex-plugin && npm run check:superskill-runtime && npm run check:public-copy && npm run check:production-config && npm run check:workspaces && npm run check:managed-archive-boundary && npm run check:superskill-catalog && npm run check:superskill-router && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:scripts
scripts.smoke:superskill-exact-release: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-exact-release.ts
scripts.smoke:superskill-exact-release:clients: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-exact-release.ts --real-client-sessions
scripts.smoke:superskill-exact-release:evidence: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-exact-release.ts --real-client-sessions --evidence-out docs/plans/superskill-mvp/evidence/2026-07-13-deep-market-researcher-0.2.1-client-evidence.json
scripts.smoke:superskill-exact-release:evidence:: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-exact-release.ts --real-client-sessions
scripts.smoke:superskill-exact-release:claude: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-exact-release.ts --real-client-sessions --real-client claude-code
scripts.smoke:superskill-exact-release:codex: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-exact-release.ts --real-client-sessions --real-client codex
scripts.smoke:superskill-mcp-go: npm run bundle -w onlyharness && node --import tsx --test packages/harness-cli/test/superskill-mcp.test.ts && tsx scripts/smoke-superskill-mcp-go.ts
